figures.caption: TABLE I: Identified dynamical model and Lyapunov function for the damped pendulum system.
Fig. 1: Phase portrait of the damped pendulum system (left) and the ℓ2 error of the learned vector field (right).
Fig. 2: ℓ2 vector field error of the learned models produced by all methods under different noise levels. LyapSR refers to the proposed method.
